zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线弱势震荡偏空
zh.content:
AVAX/USD当前报价8.834，日内波动较窄，价格持续运行于20日均线9.001附近下方，显示短线空头仍占主导。24小时跌幅虽仅0.42%，但反弹力度有限，市场情绪偏谨慎。

从技术指标观察，MACD数值为负且位于零轴下方，表明中期动能依旧偏弱，空方优势尚未完全结束。RSI数据暂缺，但结合价格结构判断，市场仍处于弱势整理阶段，尚未形成明显反转信号。

关键支撑位关注8.82附近，该区域为日内低点，同时也是短线多空分界。若失守，后续可能进一步下探8.70区域。上方阻力首先位于8.88，其后为20日均线9.00附近，突破后才有望改善整体趋势。

交易策略方面，短线更适合以高空思路为主，等待价格反弹至8.95至9.00区间观察承压情况。激进交易者可关注8.82附近的超短线反弹机会，但需严格设置止损，避免弱势行情中的快速回落风险。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Avalanche remains under moderate bearish pressure as AVAX/USD trades near 8.834, slightly below the 20-day simple moving average at 9.001. The inability to reclaim the SMA suggests short-term momentum continues to favor sellers, even though the recent daily decline of 0.42% is relatively limited. Price action is compressing within a narrow intraday range between 8.8231 and 8.8849, indicating reduced volatility and a potential buildup before the next directional move.

The MACD reading at -0.094 shows bearish momentum is still active, although the absence of a signal line limits confirmation strength. Even so, negative MACD territory generally reflects weakening buying interest and continued downside risk. RSI data is unavailable, but current market structure implies neutral-to-weak momentum rather than deeply oversold conditions. Traders should therefore remain cautious about assuming an immediate reversal without stronger confirmation from volume or broader crypto market sentiment.

From a technical perspective, immediate support appears near 8.82, which aligns with the session low and recent consolidation zone. A decisive break below this level could expose AVAX to additional downside toward the psychological 8.50 region. On the upside, resistance is forming around 9.00 to 9.05, where the SMA(20) currently sits. If buyers manage to reclaim and sustain trading above that area, momentum could improve toward the next resistance near 9.30.

Short-term traders may prefer a defensive strategy while price remains beneath the moving average. Conservative entries could wait for either a confirmed rebound from support or a breakout above 9.05 with improving momentum indicators. Aggressive bearish traders may still favor selling rallies until MACD begins to flatten or reverse upward. Risk management remains essential, especially in the current low-volatility environment where sudden crypto market swings can quickly invalidate short-term setups.
